creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update games/mirrormagic port.


diff -Nru mirrormagic/pkg/COMMENT mirrormagic-1.3/pkg/COMMENT
--- mirrormagic/pkg/COMMENT	Thu Feb  4 03:40:48 1999
+++ mirrormagic-1.3/pkg/COMMENT	Sat Mar 13 17:37:52 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-An arcade style game for X Windows with stereo sound.
+An arcade style game with stereo sound for X Window System.
diff -Nru mirrormagic/pkg/DESCR mirrormagic-1.3/pkg/DESCR
--- mirrormagic/pkg/DESCR	Thu Feb  4 03:40:48 1999
+++ mirrormagic-1.3/pkg/DESCR	Sat Mar 13 17:38:35 1999
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
-   This is a nice  little  game with color graphics and sound for your
+This is a nice  little  game with color graphics and sound for your
 Unix system with color X11. You need an 8-Bit color display or better.
 It is not  recommended  on  black&white systems, and maybe not on gray
 scale systems.
-   It  was  first  released  as "Mirror Magic" in the year 1989 on the
+
+It  was  first  released  as "Mirror Magic" in the year 1989 on the
 Amiga (with ports on other computer systems).

Fix: 

Please, check and apply this patch.
